name: python3-atomic-operator
title: python3-atomic-operator
summary: module to execute Atomic Red Team tests (Python 3)
description:
module to execute Atomic Red Team tests (Python 3)
This package is used to execute Atomic Red Team tests (Atomics) across
multiple operating system environments.
.
atomic-operator enables security professionals to test their detection and
defensive capabilities against prescribed techniques defined within
atomic-red-team. By utilizing a testing framework such as atomic-operator, you
can identify both your defensive capabilities as well as gaps in defensive
coverage.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.

arguments.description: Option present in package usage line for atomic-operator.
arguments.raw: -operator  Option present in package usage line for atomic-operator.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use atomic-operator because module to execute Atomic Red Team tests (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use atomic-operator as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `atomic-operator [options] [args]` as documented upstream for atomic-operator.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair atomic-operator with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `atomic-operator --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
